features: AMPLE STORAGE CAPACITY: These clothes peg bag for washing line holds up to 300 pegs, keeping them all in one place for easy access; You’ll no longer have to search for scattered pegs while doing laundry

HANGING CONVENIENCE: The sturdy clip lets you hang the peg bags for washing line directly on your clothesline or a hook for easy reach; This makes hanging or removing laundry faster and more efficient

DRAWSTRING CLOSURE: The adjustable drawstring keeps your pegs inside the bag when not in use; Fltaro washing line peg bag also prevents dirt and dust from getting in, keeping your pegs stay clean and ready to use
WATERPROOF MATERIAL: Made with durable Oxford fabric, this peg bag for washing line waterproof to protect your pegs from rain or moisture; It’s perfect for outdoor use and keeps your pegs dry
QUICK ACCESS TO PEGS: The wide opening allows you to grab pegs quickly without fumbling; It saves time and makes hanging laundry easier and more convenient
description: Product Description Previous page No Lost Pegs Keeps all your pegs together in one bag. Hold Up To 300 Stores a large number of pegs easily. Hang On Washing Line Clips onto the washing line for easy access. Next page Easy Peg Storage 1 No Lost Pegs 2 Hold Up To 300 3 Hang On Washing Line How Peg Bag Helps? Before Before using a peg bag, pegs often get scattered around the yard or laundry area, making them easy to lose or hard to find when you need them. Without a proper place to store them, you end up spending time searching for pegs. After With the peg bag, everything changes. You can keep all your pegs organized in one spot, easily accessible whenever you need them, and protected from getting lost or dirty. It makes laundry time much easier and more efficient.
